title: Smoky Silky Festive Peppers Stir-fry
description: A festive Croatian dish featuring red chilli flakes in a silky-smooth stir-fry with blanched peppers for added texture and flavor.
instructions: Wash the bell peppers, onion, and garlic. Cut off the tops of the peppers and remove their seeds.
Blanch the peppers in boiling water for about 1 minute until they start to soften slightly. Remove them with a slotted spoon and let cool.
In a large wok or frying pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped onion and sauté for about 2 minutes until translucent.
Add garlic and cook for another minute. Stir in red chilli flakes (if using), salt, and pepper.
Gently slide the blanched peppers into the wok along with any liquid from their bottom side. Cook for a few more minutes to release their flavor.
Serve hot as an accompaniment or side dish.
